products.name: Levi's 511 Slim Fit Jeans
products.short: The original slim — sits below the waist with a slim leg from hip to ankle.
products.long: Levi's most versatile slim jean in stretch denim that moves with you. A modern, narrow silhouette cut close through the seat and thigh with a slim leg opening.

products.name: Levi's 721 High Rise Skinny Jeans
products.short: A high, defining waist with a skinny leg for a sleek, lengthening look.
products.long: The 721 sits at the natural waist and runs skinny through the hip, thigh and ankle in comfort-stretch denim that holds its shape all day.

products.name: Jockey Wirefree Cotton Bra
products.short: Soft, breathable everyday wirefree bra in combed cotton.
products.long: A seamless, wirefree everyday bra with full cup coverage and soft cushioned straps. Made from skin-friendly combed cotton for all-day comfort.

products.name: L'Oréal Paris Total Repair 5 Shampoo
products.short: Repairs the 5 signs of damaged hair — hair fall, dryness, roughness, dullness, split ends.
products.long: Infused with Pro-Keratin and Ceramide, Total Repair 5 reinforces hair fibre, leaving hair visibly healthier, smoother and stronger with every wash.
